_comment: LLM A/B hallucination ablation corpus (IMPL §9), generated by scripts/gen-ablation-corpus.mjs from real repo symbols. 100 tasks. Run: npm run benchmark:llm-ablation (needs ANTHROPIC_API_KEY or GEMINI_API_KEY).
